notes: Mistral NDJSON v2 template test. Key changes from #322/#323: (1) Removed outer JSON array brackets - now pure NDJSON object {result:{...}} instead of [{result:{...}}], (2) title:null instead of string, (3) realistic UUID v4 chatId, (4) h2_mode=2 keep-alive (reverted from GOAWAY). Testing if tRPC client accepts the response without Error 6002.
